name: Fresh Peach Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Peeled fresh or canned Peaches, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. In a 2-quart saucepan, mix together 1/2 cup sugar, cornstarch, and nutmeg.
Stir in the peaches and lemon juice. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens and boils.
Boil for an additional minute after stirring.
2. Pour the fruit mixture into an ungreased 2-quart casserole dish. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, 1 tablespoon sugar, and salt.
Add shortening and cut through with a fork until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually add milk to form a dough. Drop the dough by about 6-8 teaspoonsful onto the hot fruit.
3. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown. Serve with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.
NOTE: Any fruit may be substituted for the peaches, ensuring similar amounts are used.
